core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Fintech precision with Hotel Luxury hospitality.
Emotion First: Every screen must feel expensive and exclusive.
Contrast: Deepest blacks vs. luminous gold/bronze.
Content is King: Property images and financial data are the heroes.

typography.instructions: Use 'Manrope' for all Headings (H1-H6) and metrics. Use 'Inter' for body text, tables, and inputs. Headings must be tracking-tight. Metrics should be prominent and bold.

layout_strategies.dashboard_grid: Mode B: High Density. Use grid-cols-12. Summary metrics col-span-12 md:col-span-3. Main chart col-span-12 md:col-span-8. Feed col-span-12 md:col-span-4.
layout_strategies.glassmorphism: Use heavily for Sidebar and Sticky Headers. bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-r border-white/5.
layout_strategies.containers: Cards must have 'rounded-xl' or 'rounded-2xl'. Borders must be subtle (border-white/5 or border-gold/10).

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#B8860B] font-semibold rounded-lg shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)] transition-all duration-300

cards.default: bg-card border border-border/50 rounded-xl shadow-none hover:border-[#D4AF37]/30 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.default: bg-input border-transparent focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] rounded-lg h-10

navigation.sidebar: Fixed left. w-64. bg-[#050505] border-r border-white/5. Links: hover:text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-white/5 rounded-md transition-all
navigation.header: Sticky top. h-16. bg-[#050505]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5 flex items-center justify-between px-6

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay on the main background if possible, or keep it clean obsidian.

universal_guidelines: NEVER use gradients for dark colors. Use solid deep blacks (#050505) or dark greys.
Interactive elements must have a golden glow on hover/active.
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for dropdowns/modals without a solid blur or dark tint backing.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE /app/frontend/src/index.css first. Replace the root variables with the provided dark mode palette. Force Dark Mode by default (add 'dark' class to html/body or set CSS vars in :root).
3. CREATE a Layout component that includes the Sidebar and Header.
4. USE the provided image URLs for the Dashboard demo data.
5. ENSURE the gold color (#D4AF37) is used for primary actions (Add Lead, Book Deal).
6. USE 'Manrope' font from Google Fonts (import in index.css).
7. IMPLEMENT the 'Wallet' page with a credit-card style visual using the gold texture.
8. BUILD the 'Marketplace' with a grid of luxury property cards.
